summary: Build M2 district panel and 4,000-row list pressure fixture
acceptance_criteria: The client exposes an M2 district panel showing seasonal, population, labor, grain, cash, and route summary fields from read models.
A 4,000-row list pressure fixture exists and is virtualized so sorting, filtering, selection, and panel updates do not require storing full WorldState in Redux/client store.
The list pressure fixture is synthetic test data and does not imply formal historical person or district content.
The UI remains responsive under normal M2 simulation speed and records measurable main-thread interaction or long-task evidence.
Storybook or Playwright coverage exercises the district panel, 4,000-row list, filtering/sorting, and selection handoff to the map or panel.
No sim-core formulas are copied into UI code and no Electron/Node integration is introduced.
required_tests: Storybook story or Playwright test covers the 4,000-row list pressure fixture and district panel selection flow.
node -e JSON parse/shape check for M2-CLIENT-DISTRICT-LIST-001
notes: This task covers the explicit 4,000-row list pressure requirement for M2.
If performance evidence is inconclusive, route to test_engineer for an isolated pressure validation task before claiming M2 UI readiness.
Lead-owned goal-mode, model-routing, and thread-registry updates are allowed only as orchestration recovery evidence for this task; they must not expand implementation scope.
